rs2395029.description: HLA-B*57:01 tag SNP — hypersensitivity risk marker for abacavir

phenotype_to_guidance.HLA-B*57:01 Negative: Low risk of abacavir hypersensitivity reaction. Abacavir may be prescribed as part of antiretroviral therapy.
phenotype_to_guidance.HLA-B*57:01 Positive: DO NOT prescribe abacavir. HLA-B*57:01 carriers have a high risk of potentially fatal hypersensitivity reaction. CPIC and FDA strongly recommend HLA-B*57:01 testing before prescribing. Use an alternative NRTI.
